name: Gingered Shrimp & Noodle Soup
recipeIngredient: Envelope noodle soup mix with real chicken broth
8 oz Frozen sugar snap peas (partially thawed), or
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine noodle soup mix, water, vinegar, ginger and red pepper flakes. Cover and bring to a boil.
2. Simmer uncovered, stirring occasionally for 1 minute.
3. Stir in shrimp, sugar snap peas and radishes.
4. Continue simmering, stirring occasionally for 4 minutes or until shrimp are pink and vegetables are tender-crisp.
Microwave Directions:
1. In a 3-quart microwave-safe casserole, combine water, vinegar, ginger and dried red pepper flakes.
2. Microwave covered on high for 10 minutes or until boiling.
3. Stir in noodle soup mix, shrimp, sugar snap peas and radishes.
4. Microwave covered for 4 minutes or until shrimp turn pink. Stir, then let stand covered for 2 minutes.
Variation: Use 1 pound boneless chicken breasts, cut into -inch pieces. Increase the cooking time to 10 minutes.
